title: Consumer Goroutines, Cancellation, and Shutdown · Contract Triage
summary: An incident packet contains a plausible a leak-resistant Go consumer lifecycle state machine with one stale generation, blocked notification, goroutine leak, acknowledgement, route, or effect defect; locate cause before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a leak-resistant Go consumer lifecycle state machine and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and e…
objectives: Report ready only after connection, topology, channel, prefetch, consume registration, and required dependencies are ready; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Track consumer tags and channel generations so stale cancellation, delivery, and close events cannot mutate current state; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Treat a closed delivery channel and consumer-cancellation notifications as lifecycle events with cause, readiness, recovery, and ownership evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Consume Registration Readiness
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Go messaging team handles case 4039 during stream-versus-queue architecture board. Build deterministic Go evidence to sequence consumer readiness, cancellation, handler draining, deadline, and close; keep credentials and connection URLs out of output; then cancel the parent context while a result is still ambiguous. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Report ready only after connection, topology, channel, prefetch, consume registration, and required dependencies are ready; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

Build deterministic Go evidence to sequence consumer readiness, cancellation, handler draining, deadline, and close; reject stale connection and channel generations; then reuse a message identity with a different payload fingerprint. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Choose acknowledgement, requeue, dead-letter, or channel-close behavior for in-flight work during graceful and forced shutdown; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

For RabbitMQ and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Shutdown Ack Policy, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Acknowledging every in-flight message during shutdown prevents both loss and duplicates. In Go, closing a context automatically waits for every handler and acknowledgement to finish.
